plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow School Transport Driver to unlock your secured driver session.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow School Transport Driver to access your location during an active trip.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow School Transport Driver to access your location during active trips.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow School Transport Driver to scan QR codes for driver enrollment and student boarding.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow School Transport Driver to capture incident photos.
